APU-47 evening-main: Found that evening posting scripts work manually (both EveningEarly and EveningMain) but Windows scheduled tasks failed to execute automatically at 6:00pm and 8:15pm. Manual execution successful - posted to TikTok, Threads, X, Bluesky, Instagram. Issue is with Task Scheduler, not posting logic.

APU-47 evening-main: Found that evening posting scripts work manually (both EveningEarly and EveningMain) but Windows scheduled tasks failed to execute automatically at 6:00pm and 8:15pm. Manual execution successful - posted to TikTok, Threads, X, Bluesky, Instagram. Issue is with Task Scheduler, not posting logic.

APU-47 evening-main RESOLVED: Root cause was both EveningEarly and EveningMain scheduled tasks were DISABLED. Created fix_evening_tasks.bat to re-enable them. Manual testing confirmed evening posting works (posted to TikTok, Threads, X, Bluesky, IG). Fix: Run fix_evening_tasks.bat as Administrator or re-run setup_scheduler.bat as Admin.
